bezeichnung: Multiuser Augmented Reality with Handheld Devices
lernziele: The student should know common augmented reality applications/technologies and be able to produce multi-user applications with them.
vorausgKenntnisse:
Visual Computing, Computer Graphics or an equivalent class. Experience with C++ programming.
Some background in geometry or computational geometry is helpful, but not necessary.

kurse.bezeichnung: Kompletter ARCore & ARKit Spieleentwickler Augmented Reality
kurse.lernziele: After successfully completing the lecture, students will understand the main concepts of Augmented Reality and be able to decide which techniques to use in particular application scenarios. Practical experience in the lab part will enable to start with own projects.
kurse.planinhalt:
Augmented Reality is a fast developing field, with many potential applications for the industry, the medical sector, and the general public.
This class will first introduce the concept and problematic of Augmented Reality. We will then present the theoretical tools and technical bricks used in Augmented Reality. We will also study past and current 3D registration systems, as well as realistic rendering methods.
kurse.bibliographie: Schamlstieg, Hollerer (2016). Augmented Reality: Principles and Practice. [978-0321883575]
kurse.empfLehrmittel: Slides and course notes, self-study with video lectures and literature.

kurse.bezeichnung: Multiuser Augmented Reality with Handheld Devices
kurse.lernziele:
The student will learn

  • what technologies exist to leverage mutli-user AR.
  • how to use these technologies.

 

The student can

  • produce AR applications leveraging Multi-User technologies.
kurse.planinhalt:
Modern smartphones are prepared to use Augmented Reality applications. These range from simple demonstrations to globaly played games. These applications are mostly experienced by one user.
Using new technologies built into smartphones, this work will explore how an augmented reality experience can be created that is shared by more than one user in real time.
kurse.leistungsnachweis: Das zu bearbeitende Projekt wird mittels Bericht und Präsentation bewertet.
